visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene is set in a large warehouse store with high industrial shelving. A woman wearing a navy blue beret, a light green puffy vest over a teal shirt, and a black pleated skirt stands in front of a display of blankets. She is holding a large, blue-and-white patterned blanket that she begins to unfold. Large brand logos and colorful text overlays appear. (2) The camera moves closer as the woman demonstrates the hooded feature of the blanket, wrapping it around her shoulders like a cape. She smiles and gestures with her hands toward the fabric's texture. (3) The shot changes to a close-up of her hands turning the blanket over to show the waterproof outer layer and then the soft, light blue plush inner lining. (4) The camera pans down and shifts focus to a stack of retail boxes containing various colors of the same product, including dark green, purple-blue, and orange-red patterns. The woman's hand points specifically at the orange-red box. (5) Close-up shots of the packaging labels and the different fabric patterns (sky design and purple cloud design) are shown. (6) The woman returns to the frame, smiling and holding up two fingers to emphasize a discount mentioned in the text overlays, while standing amidst the product display.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 露營神器! 折扣200. [Subtitle]: 連帽絨毛的. (2) [Subtitle]: 超厚被. (3) [Subtitle]: 超厚被被外套. (4) [Subtitle]: 登山客可以直接用. (5) [Subtitle]: 或露營 真是好夥伴. (6) [Subtitle]: 你看這面就是比較防水. (7) [Subtitle]: 然後這邊是刷絨的. (8) [Subtitle]: 最重要是它還有袋子可以收進去. (9) [Subtitle]: 還有它這個帽子. (10) [Subtitle]: 它的帽子是可以拔的. (11) [Subtitle]: 所以你可以戴在頭上. (12) [Subtitle]: 然後這邊有深綠. (13) [Subtitle]: 紫藍色跟橘紅色. (14) [Subtitle]: 橘紅色好好看哦. (15) [Subtitle]: 最重要是現在折200. (16) [Subtitle]: 擁抱大自然. (17) [Subtitle]: 或者是在家就包著. (18) [Subtitle]: 就離不開地板了. (19) [Variety]: 讚. [Subtitle]: 追劇神器. (20) [Subtitle]: 披起來是天空的樣子. (21) [Subtitle]: 自帶迷彩 紫雲霞. (22) [Subtitle]: 給他做一個風景圖.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 2 background shoppers visible in aisles.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman in her late 20s wearing a navy blue beret, a teal long-sleeve top, a light green quilted vest, and a black pleated skirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a Costco warehouse featuring towering steel shelves filled with bulk goods, shopping carts, and other customers in the background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice begins speaking over a cheerful acoustic guitar BGM with a steady rhythm. The speech is fast and energetic. (2) A sharp 'Whoosh' SFX triggers as the speaker highlights a product feature. The vocal pitch rises further in excitement. (3) A 'Ding' bell sound effects occurs, punctuating a specific point about the product's versatility. Background fabric rustling is audible as a subtle layer. (4) A 'Pop' sound effect marks a transition between descriptive sentences. The speaker's tone remains friendly and narrative. (5) Another 'Whoosh' sound effect accompanies a change in visual context, with the BGM maintaining a consistent major-key folk style. (6) The vocal delivery concludes with a high-arousal summary of the price discount, followed by a final musical stinger.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Feature Demonstration -> Variety Showcase -> CTA/Price Benefit
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional product review for the 'Weatherproof Vintage Hooded Outdoor Blanket' found at Costco. The creator utilizes a fast-paced, enthusiastic vlog style to demonstrate the blanket's multifunctional design (wearable coat/blanket), material quality (waterproof and plush), and portability, concluding with an incentive highlighting a seasonal discount.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct recommendation of the product, display of brand packaging, mention of specific store location (Costco), and highlight of a current discount price.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video employs typical social media 'short-form' editing with dense captions and high-arousal narration to maximize engagement for retail recommendations.
